reasoning: Extensional equality is reflexive by definition in vstd. This is a fundamental property of `=~=`, not a spec gap.
Extensional equality is symmetric by definition. This is a basic property of `=~=` in vstd, not a spec issue.
Two empty sequences are trivially extensionally equal — same length (0) and vacuously equal elements. Correct by definition.
Extensional equality requires equal length. Sequences of different lengths are never `=~=`. This is correct by the vstd definition of extensional equality.
Extensional equality requires pointwise agreement. A single differing element breaks `=~=`. Correct by definition.
